title: Radiant gems
description: Simple fabric mod that adds alternative to vanilla diamonds and netherite.
body:
# This mod in very early alpha!

What contain this mod at this time?
- Item: Radiant gem (resource)
- Item: Phosphor gem (resource)
- Item: Unstable gem (resource)
- Radiant gem tools
- Block: Radiant ore
- Radiant block
- Ore generation system
- Creative tab for mod items
- More soon

Can i help?
- Yes. Check out the codeberg page.

What used for mod development?
- Fabric and their wiki
- Pixelorama
- Gradle and OpenJDK
- Neovim and Linux machine

To-Do:
- Radiant gem [x]
- Creative tab [x]
- Radiant ore [x]
- Radiant block [x]
- Radiant tools [x]
- Radiant armor []
- Armor trims support []
- Phosphor gem [x]
- Unstable gem [x]
- Maybe some other cave related stuff like new mob?
- Other stuff
